title: Deleting the (copy) from duplicated/copied items

posts.author: MattH (Matt Hockin)
posts.cookedHtml:
(I’m on Pro plan | work management)
Hello all,
I work for a small company and I’m helping them set up their CRM. Their items need to move through several stages (boards) but need to remain in each stage for metrics/reporting etc.
When an item is copied/duplicated, “(copy)” is added to the name. Any idea how to prevent this?
I’ve read the previous thread from 2021 (Item Copy function - removing the added " (copy)") that involves a Make workaround. I attempted making the modules in Make but unfortunately I couldn’t get it to work, mainly because it’s way above my abilities/knowledge!
Just hoping that an easier solution may have become available since 2021.
Thanks in advance!
